full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #11 (2026-04-24)

PULSE
Health: 0.619 (B). 888 wallets, 147 contributors. 124 memos today vs 121 avg. Velocity steady.

FLOW
65 reward payments, 451825 PFT distributed to 24 contributors. Top earner: raL2kv...Gwzd (76240 PFT).

AIRDROPS
2 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 18,400 PFT. Highest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (9,400 PFT). Lowest: r4ahFv...5XyU (9,000 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (68,600 PFT, avg 9,800/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rDVKRN...tyjB (65 memos). 17 new wallet(s) this week. 32 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 82.5%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-03-25): 7402 transactions from 74 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA
